published_prior_art.cite: DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024 gives sharp finite discrete-SCM polynomial-program representations for declared assumptions and counterfactual targets.
Sjölander2009 and BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025 supply the no-proxy NDE bound substrate; containment follows by marginalizing a constrained completion.
This is the routine singleton-proxy reduction to the established response-function mediation model.

repo_prior_art.cite: Unpublished failed WIP pid_mediation_proxy_v1 pursued the same three-active-class, rank-two incomplete-proxy NDE endpoint-exclusion direction, though it did not establish a latent-realizable positive-cell witness.

published_prior_art.cite: No verified paper gives a positive-cell factorization-constrained strict contraction of the observed-mediator NDE interval under the stated failed-completeness model; the closest results are BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025, GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023, DorettiStanghellini2024, and ZhangSu2024.
BaiWuSunCui2026 and WuBaiCui2026 give proximal point-identification strategies, not a failed-completeness factorization-constrained sharp-set certificate.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1 / related work
novelty_flags.one_line: The closest binary-NDE and incomplete-proxy partial-ID boundaries are omitted: DorettiStanghellini2024 gives binary natural-effect intervals under PC-CWD, and ZhangSu2024 gives proxy partial identification without completeness; add and distinguish them, with HanLuoZhangGu2026 and LuoGeng2016 as adjacent mediation-bound comparators.

soundness_flags.label: ass:conditional-rank-zw
soundness_flags.one_line: Exact rank two for the joint binary-proxy operator is a nongeneric equality chosen to preclude the joint proxies from recovering the third latent direction, and its justification supplies no substantive measurement mechanism under which it is realistic.

soundness_flags.label: ass:conditional-rank-z and ass:conditional-rank-w
soundness_flags.one_line: For each two-row operator, the accompanying condition sigma_2(C)>=eta>0 already implies rank(C)=2, so the two exact-rank assumptions add no restriction.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: oeq:robust-strict-contraction
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The claim is conditional on a fixed three-state, positive-mass, conditionally independent proxy-factorization sensitivity model and makes no unrestricted-cardinality, point-identification, or inference claim.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Any endpoint contraction is a strict contraction only within the stated finite proxy-factorized model; ass:conditional-rank-zw still requires a substantive justification.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the bare joint-rank-two restriction with a substantively motivated shared-measurement mechanism that implies it, or explicitly recast the paper as a sensitivity regime and document empirical settings where the restriction is credible.
Delete ass:conditional-rank-z and ass:conditional-rank-w, retaining their singular-value lower bounds as the nonredundant conditions.
Add DorettiStanghellini2024 and ZhangSu2024 to related work and state exactly why PC-CWD and partially observed P(W|U) neither contain nor are contained in the proposed factorization model.
Produce the rational table, an explicit latent completion, and machine-checkable endpoint-face infeasibility certificates before promoting the strict-contraction question.

recommended_next_step: Continue revision on this angle: justify or redesign the joint rank-two regime, remove redundant assumptions, and repair the closest-comparator survey before pursuing the witness.
